label: Region 0
note: Informal term meaning 'worldwide'. Region 0 is not an official setting; discs that bear the Region 0 symbol either have no flag set or have flags for Regions 1–6 set.

label: Region 1
note: Canada, United States; U.S. territories; Bermuda.

label: Region 2
note: Western and Central Europe; Western Asia; Egypt, Japan, South Africa, Swaziland; British overseas territories, French overseas territories.

label: Region 3
note: Southeast Asia; South Korea; Non-mainland China (Hong Kong).

label: Region 4
note: Oceania; Central and South America; Caribbean; Mexico.

label: Region 5
note: Eastern Europe, Africa, Central and South Asia, Mongolia, North Korea.

label: Region 7
note: Reserved for future use (found in use on protected screener copies of MPAA-related DVDs and 'media copies' of pre-releases in Asia).

label: Region 8
note: International venues such as aircraft, cruise ships, etc.

label: Region ALL
note: Region ALL discs have all eight flags set, allowing the disc to be played in any locale on any player.
